stemHtml: At 2000 ft in climb, ATC clears you to FL120. The altimeter setting shall...

options.a: change to 1013.2 hPa as soon as cleared.
options.b: remain on QNH until passing the transition level.
options.c: change to 1013.2 hPa immediately under ATC.
options.d: remain on QNH until passing the transition altitude.
